# function: cidrs_containing_ip

Returns every CIDR from `cidrs` that contains `ip` as a list. Returns an empty list if none match. Multiple CIDRs may match when the list contains overlapping prefixes (e.g. a summary /8 and a more-specific /24 both match).

**Common uses:** routing decisions — given an observed IP, find every VRF, VPC, or security zone it belongs to; determining which policy rules apply to a given address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Given an IP, find every matching CIDR — useful for routing decisions
# when summary and specific routes overlap.
output "matches" {
  value = provider::burnham::cidrs_containing_ip(
    "10.0.1.5",
    ["10.0.0.0/8", "10.0.1.0/24", "192.168.0.0/16"],
  )
  # → ["10.0.0.0/8", "10.0.1.0/24"]
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidrs_containing_ip(ip string, cidrs list of string) list of string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `ip` (String) The IP address to look up.
1. `cidrs` (List of String) The list of CIDRs to search.
